creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Joe Marcus Clarke from comment #1)
> Does this patch work for you?
> 
> http://www.marcuscom.com/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/portlint/portlint.pl.diff?r1=1.381&r2=1.382&f=h

Yes, I can confirm this prevents the spurious fatal error for math/ogdf. It appears to fix the problem.

BEFORE PATCH:
/usr/ports/math/ogdf# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
FATAL: Makefile: URL "http://www.ogdf.net/lib/exe/fetch.php/tech:" should end with "/" or a group name (e.g. :something).
1 fatal error and 1 warning found.

AFTER PATCH:
/usr/ports/math/ogdf# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
